title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 28, 2024
summary: March 28, 2024: The sea ice has increased this week at a small rate of 0.39% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 0.61%), from the level on 03/21/2024 of 14.885 M km 2 to 14.944 M km 2 for this week. The change to the sea ice melt season we have been waiting for is still a bit of a roller coa...
